title: Developer Portal and Documentation Overhaul — One Source of Truth That Stays Correct
description: Restructure the developer portal from a 200-page unnavigable Confluence space into a curated, searchable knowledge base with automated freshness enforcement. Phase 1 (Q2): audit and archive stale content, establish a navigation structure with search, implement CI-tested documentation for the component library (Storybook validated in CI so stories cannot go stale). Phase 2 (Q3): extend to service onboarding guides and platform capability docs. Directly addresses the documentation trust deficit identified across all three discovery interviews.
